immediateFixes.title: Fix superadmin account save failure
immediateFixes.rootCause: cp-admin-accounts is intentionally blocked in /api/db/settings PUT, but /cam/accounts used that protected route for writes.
immediateFixes.resolution: Add /api/admin/accounts with authenticated read, superadmin-only write, server-side password hashing, secret stripping, and active superadmin guard.
verification: GET does not return password or passwordHash
PUT preserves existing passwordHash when no new password is supplied
PUT hashes new password updates server-side

immediateFixes.title: D1/R2 live data path regression check
verification: article list/detail/search read from selected provider
article create/update/delete writes to selected provider
comments, notifications, and view logs use selected read adapters
Supabase-restricted state does not break D1/R2-backed live features

featureMatrix.risk: content loss or duplicate article numbers

futureHardening: Add Playwright admin smoke with ADMIN_SMOKE_USERNAME and ADMIN_SMOKE_PASSWORD.
Send daily D1/R2/Supabase usage and automation failure report to Telegram.
Block press auto-publish unless body quality and required fields pass.
Keep copyrighted article auto-publish disabled and convert it to link queue plus manual approval.
